scripts.clean: tsc -b --clean && npm run clean --workspaces --if-present && find . -type f \( -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' -o -name '*.js.map' -o -name '*.d.ts' \) -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete && find . -mindepth 3 -type f -name '*.js' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -delete
scripts.platform:up: npm run services:up --workspace @capture-automation-platform/browser-orchestrator && concurrently -k -p '[{name}]' -n 'API,WORKER' -c 'cyan,magenta' "npm run start --workspace @capture-automation-platform/ingress-api" "npm run start --workspace @capture-automation-platform/browser-orchestrator"
